creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 205604
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.11.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to 2.11.0, a minor release.

Additionally, the following changes are contained within this patch:

  - Incorporates changes from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=238916
  - Adds a DOCS option
  - Updates pkg-message to use UCL and adds messages about breaking changes going back to 2.2 (2.1.0 was the oldest prometheus2 I found in supported FreeBSD pkg repos).

-David
